---
title: "Variable Window Size for Stepwise NOW"
---

```{r dacsetup, include=FALSE}
write.table(c("",
              "####################################",
              "####     Divide and Conquer     ####",
              "####################################"),
            file=fn_log, quote=F, row.names=F, col.names=F, append=T)

outdir_division <- paste0(getwd(), "/division/")
outdir_conquer <- paste0(getwd(), "/conquer/")
outdir_final <- paste0(getwd(), "/final/")

# output files
fn_division_summary <- paste0(outdir_division, "summary_aic.tsv")
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
options(scipen=999)

# extract list of windows
ls_windows <- list.dirs(params$outdir_stepwise_now_filtered, recursive=F, full.names=F)
ls_windows_iter <- gsub("window_", "", ls_windows)

# select the first and last windows
first_window <- as.numeric(ls_windows_iter[1])
last_window <- as.numeric(ls_windows_iter[length(ls_windows_iter)])
zerowidth <- length(unlist(strsplit(ls_windows_iter[1], split="")))

# create doSNOW cluster
nwcl <- makeCluster(params$thread)
doSNOW::registerDoSNOW(nwcl)

# save the AIC per window
df_output <- foreach (window = ls_windows, .combine='rbind') %dopar% {
  # input files
  fn_fasta <- paste0(params$outdir_stepwise_now_filtered, "/", window, "/", window, ".fa")
  fn_iqtree <- paste0(fn_fasta, ".iqtree")
  fn_treefile <- paste0(fn_fasta, ".treefile")

  # calculate AIC
  out <- f_window_tree_statistics(fn_iqtree, fn_treefile, NULL, NULL)
  aic <- (2 * out$freeparams) - (2 * out$logl)

  # read FASTA
  s <- seqinr::read.fasta(fn_fasta, whole.header = T)

  # update data.table
  return(data.table::data.table(window=window, length=length(s[[1]]), aic=aic, is_divided=TRUE, notes=""))
}

stopCluster(nwcl)

# update data.table
ls_df_output <- list(df_output)
```

```{r division}
is_repeat <- TRUE
workdir <- paste0(params$outdir_stepwise_now_filtered, "/")

# create doSNOW cluster
nwcl <- makeCluster(params$thread)
doSNOW::registerDoSNOW(nwcl)

# iterate over windows
while (is_repeat) {
  df_current <- ls_df_output[[length(ls_df_output)]]

  if (!all(df_current$is_divided)) {
    is_repeat <- FALSE
    break
  }
  
  df_output <- foreach (i = 1:nrow(df_current), .combine='rbind') %dopar% {
    log4r::info(fn_logger, paste0("Analysing ", df_current$window[i], "..."))

    if (!df_current$is_divided[i]) {
      return(data.table::data.table(window=df_current$window[i], length=df_current$length[i], aic=df_current$aic[i], is_divided=FALSE))
    }

    # input files
    fn_fasta <- paste0(workdir, df_current$window[i], "/", df_current$window[i], ".fa")

    # output directory
    dir_output <- paste0(outdir_division, df_current$window[i], "/")
    if (!dir.exists(dir_output)) {
      dir.create(dir_output, recursive=T)
    }

    # read FASTA
    seq <- seqinr::read.fasta(fn_fasta, whole.header = T)
    ln_seq <- length(seq[[1]])

    # extract AIC
    df_prop <- data.table::data.table(prop=character(), window_one=character(), window_two=character(), length_one=numeric(), length_two=numeric(), aic_one=numeric(), aic_two=numeric())
    for (prop in params$division_prop) {
      log4r::info(fn_logger, paste0("- Prop: ", prop))

      window_one <- paste0(df_current$window[i], "_", gsub("\\.","",prop), "_1")
      window_two <- paste0(df_current$window[i], "_", gsub("\\.","",prop), "_2")

      # extract the alignment
      midpoint <- ceiling(prop*ln_seq)
      f_perwindow_run(dir_output, seq, window_one, 1, midpoint)
      f_perwindow_run(dir_output, seq, window_two, midpoint+1, ln_seq)

      # run IQ-TREE2
      fn_fasta_one <- paste0(dir_output, window_one, ".fa")
      fn_fasta_two <- paste0(dir_output, window_two, ".fa")
      f_iqtree2_single(fn_fasta_one, NULL, ln_seq, params$set_blmin, params$set_model, params$dna_model, "", 0, params$iqtree2dir)
      f_iqtree2_single(fn_fasta_two, NULL, ln_seq, params$set_blmin, params$set_model, params$dna_model, "", 0, params$iqtree2dir)

      # extract AIC
      fn_iqtree_one <- paste0(fn_fasta_one, ".iqtree")
      fn_treefile_one <- paste0(fn_fasta_one, ".treefile")
      if (!file.exists(fn_iqtree_one)) {
        next
      }

      out_one <- f_window_tree_statistics(fn_iqtree_one, fn_treefile_one, NULL, NULL)
      aic_one <- (2 * out_one$freeparams) - (2 * out_one$logl)

      fn_iqtree_two <- paste0(fn_fasta_two, ".iqtree")
      fn_treefile_two <- paste0(fn_fasta_two, ".treefile")
      if (!file.exists(fn_iqtree_two)) {
        next
      }

      out_two <- f_window_tree_statistics(fn_iqtree_two, fn_treefile_two, NULL, NULL)
      aic_two <- (2 * out_two$freeparams) - (2 * out_two$logl)

      # update data.frame
      df_prop <- rbind(df_prop, data.table::data.table(prop=prop, window_one=window_one, window_two=window_two,
                                                                  length_one=length(1:midpoint), length_two=length(midpoint+1:ln_seq),
                                                                  aic_one=aic_one, aic_two=aic_two))
    }

    # save data.frame
    fn_output <- paste0(dir_output, "aic_table.tsv")
    data.table::fwrite(df_prop, file=fn_output, quote=F, row.names=F, col.names=T, sep="\t")

    # extract the best AIC score
    if (nrow(df_prop) == 0) {
      return(data.table::data.table(window=df_current$window[i], length=df_current$length[i], aic=df_current$aic[i], is_divided=FALSE, notes=""))
    }

    df_output_min_aic <- df_prop %>% mutate(sum_aic=aic_one+aic_two) %>% filter(sum_aic==min(sum_aic))
    if (df_output_min_aic$sum_aic[1] < df_current$aic[i]) {
      return(rbind(data.table::data.table(window=df_output_min_aic$window_one[1], length=df_output_min_aic$length_one[1], aic=df_output_min_aic$aic_one[1], is_divided=TRUE, notes=""),
                   data.table::data.table(window=df_output_min_aic$window_two[1], length=df_output_min_aic$length_two[1], aic=df_output_min_aic$aic_two[1], is_divided=TRUE, notes="")))
    } else {
      return(data.table::data.table(window=df_current$window[i], length=df_current$length[i], aic=df_current$aic[i], is_divided=FALSE, notes=""))
    }
  }

  ls_df_output <- c(ls_df_output, list(df_output))
}

stopCluster(nwcl)

data.table::fwrite(ls_df_output[[length(ls_df_output)]], file=fn_division_summary, quote=F, row.names=F, col.names=T, sep="\t")
```
